name: recursive-tree-sum
query: let totalSize = add(/size, /children * totalSize | sum) | {:size 0 :children [{:size 100 :children []} {:size 200 :children []}]} | totalSize

name: recursive-count-nodes
query: let countNodes = add(1, /children * countNodes | sum) | {:children [{:children []} {:children []}]} | countNodes
